summary: List Change History for a Generic Tool Item
description:
Returns a list of all change histories for a generic tool item in the specified project and generic tool.
For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints,
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool.

parameters.name: generic_tool_item_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool item.

readable_column.description: Localized readable name of the column changed

formatted_column.description: Human readable name of the column changed

old_value.description: Value of the column before change

new_value.description: Value of the column after change
